channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18300] conf-sanity test_104a: MDT already mounted and can't be formatted
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/1b40dc17-d58b-4aa3-a189-a07fce40d853

test_104a failed with the following error:

test_104a returned 10

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/108061 - 5.14.0-362.24.1.el9_3.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/108061 - 5.14.0-362.24.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

Description:

/mnt/lustre-mds3 was unmounted but seemingly failed. Successful unmount for /mnt/lustre-mds1 on same host included below:

CMD: trevis-106vm19 grep -c /mnt/lustre-mds1' ' /proc/mounts || true
Stopping /mnt/lustre-mds1 (opts:-f) on trevis-106vm19
CMD: trevis-106vm19 umount -d -f /mnt/lustre-mds1
CMD: trevis-106vm19 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null &&
lctl dl | grep ' ST ' || true
CMD: trevis-106vm20 grep -c /mnt/lustre-mds2' ' /proc/mounts || true
Stopping /mnt/lustre-mds2 (opts:-f) on trevis-106vm20
CMD: trevis-106vm20 umount -d -f /mnt/lustre-mds2
CMD: trevis-106vm20 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null &&
lctl dl | grep ' ST ' || true
CMD: trevis-106vm19 grep -c /mnt/lustre-mds3' ' /proc/mounts || true
Stopping /mnt/lustre-mds3 (opts:-f) on trevis-106vm19
CMD: trevis-106vm19 umount -d -f /mnt/lustre-mds3
CMD: trevis-106vm19 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null &&
lctl dl | grep ' ST ' || true

This caused mkfs.lustre to fail for /dev/mapper/mds3_flakey later:

Format mds3: /dev/mapper/mds3_flakey
CMD: trevis-106vm19 [ -e "/dev/mapper/mds3_flakey" ]
CMD: trevis-106vm19 grep -c /mnt/lustre-mds3' ' /proc/mounts || true
CMD: trevis-106vm19 lsmod | grep lnet > /dev/null &&
lctl dl | grep ' ST ' || true
CMD: trevis-106vm19 mkfs.lustre --mgsnode=10.240.44.158@tcp --fsname=lustre --mdt --index=2 --param=sys.timeout=20 --param=mdt.identity_upcall=/usr/sbin/l_getidentity --backfstype=ldiskfs --device-size=200000 --mkfsoptions=\"-b 4096 -E lazy_itable_init\" --mountfsoptions=acl,user_xattr --reformat /dev/mapper/mds3_flakey
trevis-106vm19: /dev/mapper/mds3_flakey: is currently mounted, exiting without any change
pdsh@trevis-106vm10: trevis-106vm19: ssh exited with exit code 17

   Permanent disk data:
Target:     lustre:MDT0002
Index:      2
Lustre FS:  lustre
Mount type: ldiskfs
Flags:      0x61
              (MDT first_time update )
Persistent mount opts: acl,user_xattr,errors=remount-ro
Parameters: mgsnode=10.240.44.158@tcp sys.timeout=20 mdt.identity_upcall=/usr/sbin/l_getidentity

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
conf-sanity test_104a - test_104a returned 10
item.summary: conf-sanity test_104a: MDT already mounted and can't be formatted

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
